title: Snoopy | Revenge is Sweetie | BRAND NEW Peanuts Animation | Videos for Kids | Cartoons
description: Snoopy | Revenge is Sweetie | BRAND NEW Peanuts Animation | Videos for Kids | Cartoons

sentence_ids.text: Some kid on the playground pushed me.

translations.vi: Một đứa nhóc ở sân chơi đã xô em
translations.th: เด็กคนหนึ่งในสนามเด็กเล่นผลักฉัน
translations.id: Ada anak kecil di taman bermain yang mendorong saya.

sentence_ids.ipa: sʌm kɪd ɒn ðə ˈpleɪɡraʊnd pʊʃt miː

sentence_ids.text: I want you to teach him a lesson.

translations.vi: Em muốn anh dạy cho nó một bài học
translations.th: ฉันอยากให้พี่สั่งสอนเขาหน่อย

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ wɒnt juː tuː tiːʧ hɪm ə ˈlɛsᵊn

sentence_ids.text: I want you to pound him into the ground.

translations.vi: Em muốn anh đập nó xuống đất
translations.th: ฉันอยากให้พี่กระแทกเขาลงดิน

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ wɒnt juː tuː paʊnd hɪm ˈɪntuː ðə ɡraʊnd

sentence_ids.text: Forget it.

translations.vi: Quên đi
translations.th: ช่างมันเถอะ

sentence_ids.ipa: fəˈɡɛt ɪt

sentence_ids.text: I'm not going over to some kids house to beat him up for you.

translations.vi: Anh sẽ không đến nhà ai đó chỉ để đánh nó vì em
translations.th: ฉันจะไม่ไปบ้านเด็กคนนั้นเพื่อไปตีเขาแทนเธอ
translations.id: Aku tidak akan pergi ke rumah anak-anak untuk menghajarnya untukmu.
translations.ar: لن أذهب إلى منزل طفلٍ لأضربه من أجلك.

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪm nɒt ˈɡəʊɪŋ ˈəʊvə tuː sʌm kɪdz haʊs tuː biːt hɪm ʌp fɔː juː

sentence_ids.text: You don't have to.

translations.vi: anh không cần phải làm vậy
translations.th: เธอไม่ต้องทำ

sentence_ids.ipa: juː dəʊnt hæv tuː

sentence_ids.text: I brought him here.

translations.vi: Em đã đưa nó đến đây
translations.th: ฉันพาเขามาที่นี่แล้ว

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ brɔːt hɪm hɪə

sentence_ids.text: What?

translations.vi: Gì cơ
translations.th: อะไรนะ

sentence_ids.ipa: wɒt

sentence_ids.text: This is the kid that pushed you?

translations.vi: Đây là đứa bé đã xô em
translations.th: นี่คือเด็กที่ผลักเธอ
translations.ar: هل هذا هو الطفل الذي دفعك؟

sentence_ids.ipa: ðɪs ɪz ðə kɪd ðæt pʊʃt juː

sentence_ids.text: I can't beat up a little kid.

translations.vi: Anh không thể đánh một đứa nhóc nhỏ thế này
translations.th: ฉันไม่สามารถตีเด็กตัวเล็ก ๆ ได้
translations.id: Aku tidak bisa memukuli anak kecil.

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ kɑːnt biːt ʌp ə ˈlɪtᵊl kɪd

sentence_ids.text: You're my big brother.

translations.vi: Anh là anh trai của em
translations.th: พี่เป็นพี่ชายของฉัน

sentence_ids.ipa: jɔː maɪ bɪɡ ˈbrʌðə

sentence_ids.text: You're supposed to stand up for me.

translations.vi: Anh phải đứng ra bảo vệ em chứ
translations.th: พี่ควรจะยืนหยัดเพื่อฉันสิ

sentence_ids.ipa: jɔː səˈpəʊzd tuː stænd ʌp fɔː miː

sentence_ids.text: He is just a little kid.

translations.vi: Nó chỉ là một đứa nhóc
translations.th: เขาเป็นแค่เด็กตัวเล็ก

sentence_ids.ipa: hiː ɪz ʤʌst ə ˈlɪtᵊl kɪd

sentence_ids.text: But on the home team.

translations.vi: Nhưng thuộc đội nhà
translations.th: แต่เขาอยู่ทีมเจ้าบ้าน

sentence_ids.ipa: bʌt ɒn ðə həʊm tiːm

sentence_ids.text: Whatever happened to your team, spirit?

translations.vi: Tinh thần đồng đội của anh đâu rồi
translations.th: แล้วจิตวิญญาณของทีมพี่หายไปไหน

sentence_ids.ipa: wɒtˈɛvə ˈhæpᵊnd tuː jɔː tiːm, ˈspɪrɪt

sentence_ids.text: I won't do it.

translations.vi: Anh sẽ không làm vậy
translations.th: ฉันไม่ทำหรอก

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ wəʊnt duː ɪt

sentence_ids.text: You won't hit him for me?

translations.vi: Anh sẽ không đánh nó vì em sao
translations.th: พี่จะไม่ตีเขาแทนฉัน

sentence_ids.ipa: juː wəʊnt hɪt hɪm fɔː miː

sentence_ids.text: Could you get your dog to bite him for me?

translations.vi: Vậy anh có thể bảo chó của anh cắn nó vì em không
translations.th: งั้นพี่จะให้หมาของพี่กัดเขาแทนฉันได้ไหม
translations.id: Bisakah kau suruh anjingmu menggigitnya untukku?
translations.ar: هل يُمكنك أن تجعَل كلبك يعضُّه من أجلي؟

sentence_ids.ipa: kʊd juː ɡɛt jɔː dɒɡ tuː baɪt hɪm fɔː miː

sentence_ids.text: Would you look at him crossly for me?

translations.vi: Vậy anh có thể nhìn nó một cách khó chịu giúp em được không
translations.th: พี่จะมองเขาอย่างไม่พอใจแทนฉันได้ไหม
translations.id: Bisakah kau menatapnya dengan kesal untukku?
translations.ar: هل يُمكنك أن تنظر إليه بغضب من أجلي؟

sentence_ids.ipa: wʊd juː lʊk æt hɪm ˈkrɒsli fɔː miː

sentence_ids.text: Good.

translations.vi: Tốt
translations.th: ดี

sentence_ids.ipa: ɡʊd

sentence_ids.text: Look, kid, why did you push Sally?

translations.vi: Này nhóc, tại sao em lại xô Sally
translations.th: ดูนี่ เด็กน้อย ทำไมเธอถึงผลักแซลลี่
translations.ar: انظر يا صغيري، لماذا دفعتَ سالي؟

sentence_ids.ipa: lʊk, kɪd, waɪ dɪd juː pʊʃ ˈsæli

sentence_ids.text: It was an accident.

translations.vi: Đó là một tai nạn
translations.th: มันเป็นอุบัติเหตุ

sentence_ids.ipa: ɪt wɒz ən ˈæksɪdᵊnt

sentence_ids.text: I tripped on a rock and fell into her.

translations.vi: Em vấp phải một hòn đá và ngã vào cô ấy
translations.th: ฉันสะดุดหินและล้มใส่เธอ
translations.id: Aku tersandung batu dan jatuh ke arahnya.

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ trɪpt ɒn ə rɒk ænd fɛl ˈɪntuː hɜː

sentence_ids.text: A likely story.

translations.vi: Nghe có vẻ hợp lý nhỉ
translations.th: เรื่องมันน่าเชื่อมาก

sentence_ids.ipa: ə ˈlaɪkli ˈstɔːri

sentence_ids.text: Sally, I think you should let him go home.

translations.vi: Sally, anh nghĩ em nên để cậu ấy về nhà
translations.th: แซลลี่ ฉันคิดว่าเธอควรปล่อยให้เขากลับบ้าน
translations.id: Sally, kurasa kau harus membiarkannya pulang.
translations.ar: سالي، أعتقد أن عليكِ أن تدعيه يذهب إلى المنزل.

sentence_ids.ipa: ˈsæli, aɪ θɪŋk juː ʃʊd lɛt hɪm ɡəʊ həʊm

sentence_ids.text: He seems nice enough.

translations.vi: Cậu ấy có vẻ tử tế mà
translations.th: เขาดูเป็นเด็กดี

sentence_ids.ipa: hiː siːmz naɪs ɪˈnʌf

sentence_ids.text: He just tripped.

translations.vi: Cậu ấy chỉ vấp thôi
translations.th: เขาแค่สะดุดล้ม

sentence_ids.ipa: hiː ʤʌst trɪpt

sentence_ids.text: It's true.

translations.vi: Đúng vậy
translations.th: มันจริง

sentence_ids.ipa: ɪts truː

sentence_ids.text: I would never push Sally.

translations.vi: Em sẽ không bao giờ xô Sally
translations.th: ฉันไม่มีวันผลักแซลลี่
translations.id: Aku tidak akan pernah mendorong Sally.

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ wʊd ˈnɛvə pʊʃ ˈsæli

sentence_ids.text: I think she's cute.

translations.vi: Em nghĩ cô ấy dễ thương
translations.th: ฉันคิดว่าเธอน่ารัก

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ θɪŋk ʃiːz kjuːt

sentence_ids.text: He just thinks you're cute, Sally.

translations.vi: Cậu ấy chỉ nghĩ em dễ thương, Sally
translations.th: เขาแค่คิดว่าเธอน่ารัก แซลลี่
translations.id: Dia hanya berpikir kau lucu, Sally.
translations.ar: هو فقط يعتقد أنكِ لطيفة، يا سالي.

sentence_ids.ipa: hiː ʤʌst θɪŋks jɔː kjuːt, ˈsæli

sentence_ids.text: Little kids do crazy things when they're in love.

translations.vi: Trẻ con làm những điều điên rồ khi chúng đang yêu
translations.th: เด็กเล็กมักจะทำสิ่งบ้า ๆ เมื่อพวกเขาตกหลุมรัก
translations.id: Anak-anak kecil melakukan hal-hal gila saat mereka jatuh cinta.
translations.ar: الأطفال الصغار يفعلون أشياءً مجنونة عندما يكونون مُغرمين.

sentence_ids.ipa: ˈlɪtᵊl kɪdz duː ˈkreɪzi θɪŋz wɛn ðeər ɪn lʌv

sentence_ids.text: What could he possibly know about love?

translations.vi: Một đứa trẻ thì biết gì về tình yêu chứ
translations.th: เด็กแบบเขาจะรู้อะไรเกี่ยวกับความรัก
translations.id: Apa yang mungkin dia ketahui tentang cinta?
translations.ar: ماذا يُمكن أن يعرف عن الحب؟

sentence_ids.ipa: wɒt kʊd hiː ˈpɒsəbli nəʊ əˈbaʊt lʌv

sentence_ids.text: Look here, kid.

translations.vi: Này nhóc
translations.th: ดูนี่ เด็กน้อย

sentence_ids.ipa: lʊk hɪə, kɪd

sentence_ids.text: You better watch your step.

translations.vi: Tốt nhất là em nên cẩn thận đấy
translations.th: เธอควรระวังตัวให้ดี

sentence_ids.ipa: juː ˈbɛtə wɒʧ jɔː stɛp

sentence_ids.text: Next time you push me around, we won't go so easy on you.

translations.vi: Lần sau mà còn xô tôi, chúng tôi sẽ không nhẹ nhàng với em đâu
translations.th: ครั้งหน้าถ้าเธอผลักฉันอีก เราจะไม่ปล่อยให้มันง่ายแบบนี้
translations.id: Lain kali kau macam-macam denganku, kami tidak akan segan-segan lagi.
translations.ar: في المرة القادمة التي تدفعني فيها، لن نكون لُطفاء معك.

sentence_ids.ipa: nɛkst taɪm juː pʊʃ miː əˈraʊnd, wiː wəʊnt ɡəʊ səʊ ˈiːzi ɒn juː

sentence_ids.text: Now get lost.

translations.vi: Giờ thì biến đi
translations.th: ตอนนี้ไปซะ

sentence_ids.ipa: naʊ ɡɛt lɒst

sentence_ids.text: Stupid kid.

translations.vi: Thằng nhóc ngốc
translations.th: เด็กโง่

sentence_ids.ipa: ˈstjuːpɪd kɪd

sentence_ids.text: Weren't you awfully hard on him?

translations.vi: Em không thấy em quá nặng tay với nó à
translations.th: เธอไม่คิดว่าเธอแรงเกินไปเหรอ
translations.id: Apa kau tidak terlalu keras padanya?

sentence_ids.ipa: wɜːnt juː ˈɔːfᵊli hɑːd ɒn hɪm

sentence_ids.text: I think he's cute.

translations.vi: Em nghĩ nó dễ thương
translations.th: ฉันว่ามันน่ารักดี

sentence_ids.ipa: aɪ θɪŋk hiːz kjuːt
